scripts.start: npm run db:migrate:deploy --workspace @gighub/api && npm run start --workspace @gighub/api
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @gighub/shared && concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @gighub/shared && npm run build --workspace @gighub/api && npm run build --workspace @gighub/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @gighub/shared && npm run lint --workspace @gighub/api && npm run lint --workspace @gighub/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @gighub/shared && dotenv -e .env -- npm run test --workspace @gighub/api && npm run test --workspace @gighub/web
